Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,331,068Details
International Box Office $3,787,786
Worldwide Box Office $33,118,854
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,350,572 (31.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:88.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,503 opening theaters/2,503 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $53,419,381

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 20th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: April 8th, 2004 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: July 20th, 2004 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild thematic elements and brief language.
Running Time: 89 minutes

Target audience: Tween

Production Countries: United States, Germany
Languages: English
